title: Service Reliability - Are We Keeping Our Promise?

panels.title: How Often Requests Succeed (now)
panels.description: Share of user requests that work right now. Our promise is 99.5%. Closer to 100% is better.

panels.title: Reliability Budget Left This Month
panels.description: We allow a small amount of failure each month (about 216 minutes). This shows how much of that 'budget' is still unused. 100% = none spent.

panels.title: How Fast We're Using the Budget
panels.description: Speed at which we're spending the reliability budget. 1x = normal. Above 14x means we'll run out fast and someone gets paged.

panels.title: Budget Burn Speed Over Time
panels.description: Trend of how fast we're using the reliability budget over the last day. The fast (1h) line reacts quickly; the slow (6h) line shows sustained trouble.
